title: ophrys × littoralis
intro: Ophrys × littoralis, a hybrid orchid, is a rare and intriguing plant resulting from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys bombyliflora, characterized by its unique and often variable appearance. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Ophrys × littoralis are thought to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as the potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to note that its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
